prompt: Product cloned three surveys off our standard template this sprint, and now the template itself has everyone's questions in it, new drafts come pre-polluted with other teams' edits, and marking a question optional in one survey flipped it in another team's survey. We DO copy the template in newDraft — the copy code is right there — so I'm stumped. `node --test test_drafts.ts` fails on exactly this. Fix drafts.ts. Don't touch the tests, don't redesign the API.
